title: PixelFire
description: PixelFire is an ultra-complete Cobblemon modpack, specially made for those who want to fully embrace the world of Pokémon within the best pixelated or blocky experience that Minecraft has to offer.
body:
![PixelFire Oficial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c04d7c0780ef0d7dee25b0f40ffb30f7c3e9b55.png)

DISCORD: https://discord.gg/A7haEnQxHf

# Description
**About** | The creation of PixelFire is an ultra-complete Cobblemon modpack, specially made for those who want to fully embrace the world of Pokémon within the best pixelated or blocky experience that Minecraft has to offer. A complete world where you can choose your own journey—whether it’s solo, multiplayer, on a server, or even participating in tournaments... The possibilities are vast! Our focus is to reach the pinnacle of Minecraft x Pokémon with everything that makes it complete: soundtracks, textures, interfaces... make your own true journey on FIRE!


The modpack initially features the Cobblemon mods and extensions, alongside several optimization mods to ensure smoother gameplay, and aesthetic mods for improved visuals. Textures are included to change interfaces and game soundtracks. Additionally, some shaders are available.


![PixelFire Oficial](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01a90905a549c1e0a56021c6a713735f4148165b.png)

# **Torneios** *(Championships)*

  The modpack has already been the setting for private tournaments held by a few communities. Furthermore, we take great pride in being recognized for hosting tournaments. We are highly enthusiastic about competitions and tournaments.
